parentage_level.title: Parentage Level
parentage_level.description: Specify whether a SKU is a parent or child

value.title: Parentage Level
value.description: Specify whether a SKU is a parent or child

child_parent_sku_relationship.title: Child Parent Sku Relationship
child_parent_sku_relationship.description: The attribute indicates the Child Parent Sku Relationship of the product

child_relationship_type.title: Child Relationship Type
child_relationship_type.description: The relationship that the child has to the parent

parent_sku.title: Parent SKU
parent_sku.description: The SKU of the parent item

variation_theme.title: Variation Theme
variation_theme.description: Specify the variation theme that the product will use. The theme's attributes must be populated for all items in the grouping.

name.title: Variation Theme Name
name.description: Specify the variation theme that the product will use. The theme's attributes must be populated for all items in the grouping.

item_name.title: Title
item_name.description: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

value.title: Item Name
value.description: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

brand.title: Brand Name
brand.description: Provide the brand name of the product

value.title: Brand Name
value.description: Provide the brand name of the product

supplier_declared_has_product_identifier.title: Has GTIN exemption?
supplier_declared_has_product_identifier.description: Specify if the product is exempt from having a GTIN/UPC/EAN.

value.title: Has GTIN exemption?
value.description: Specify if the product is exempt from having a GTIN/UPC/EAN.

externally_assigned_product_identifier.title: External Product ID
externally_assigned_product_identifier.description: Provide the external ID (barcode) type and corresponding value that is being used to identify the product

type.title: External Product ID Type
type.description: Select the type of external ID (barcode) that is being used to identify this product

value.title: External Product ID
value.description: Provide the corresponding external product id value based on the type that was selected

merchant_suggested_asin.title: Merchant Suggested ASIN
merchant_suggested_asin.description: Provide an ASIN for your product if one exists. If a value is not provided, the system will attempt a match based on the External Product ID.

value.title: Merchant Suggested ASIN
value.description: Provide an ASIN for your product if one exists. If a value is not provided, the system will attempt a match based on the External Product ID.

item_type_keyword.title: Item Type Keyword
item_type_keyword.description: Provide the specific type of jewelry item being sold, helping to categorize and place the product accurately within the jewelry category.

value.title: Item Type Keyword
value.description: Provide the specific type of jewelry item being sold, helping to categorize and place the product accurately within the jewelry category.

product_description.title: Product Description
product_description.description: Provide a text description of the product. This information will appear in paragraph form on the detail page of your product. Include unique product features, product line details, and product specifications. Do not use all caps.
examples: This summer, boots by Jette made from high quality suede leather are real gems. They visually highlight the craftsmanship and fine leather braid positioned at the top of the shaft

value.title: Product Description
value.description: Provide a text description of the product. This information will appear in paragraph form on the detail page of your product. Include unique product features, product line details, and product specifications. Do not use all caps.
examples: This summer, boots by Jette made from high quality suede leather are real gems. They visually highlight the craftsmanship and fine leather braid positioned at the top of the shaft

bullet_point.title: Bullet Point
bullet_point.description: Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviations. Please do NOT use for fabric content, care instructions or country as these are populated in different fields.

value.title: Bullet Point
value.description: Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviations. Please do NOT use for fabric content, care instructions or country as these are populated in different fields.

generic_keyword.title: Generic Keyword
generic_keyword.description: Provide any terms that may be relevant to customer searches. No repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.
examples: Water sport shoes; Derek Rose; Electric; Wi-Fi; Banana

value.title: Generic Keyword
value.description: Provide any terms that may be relevant to customer searches. No repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.
examples: Water sport shoes; Derek Rose; Electric; Wi-Fi; Banana

style.title: Style
style.description: Provide the design aesthetic or fashion category that defines the decorative appearance.

value.title: Style
value.description: Provide the design aesthetic or fashion category that characterizes the item's appearance and artistic influence.

department.title: Department Name
department.description: Provide the section of the store where the jewelry item is typically sold, indicating the intended customer group.

value.title: Department Name
value.description: Provide the section of the store where the jewelry item is typically sold, such as women's, men's, or children's.

target_gender.title: Target Gender
target_gender.description: Provide the target gender for the product

value.title: Target Gender
value.description: Provide the target gender for the product

age_range_description.title: Age Range Description
age_range_description.description: Provide the age group the item is suitable for, indicating the appropriate ages or life stages it is designed for.

value.title: Age Range Description
value.description: Provide the age range for which the bracelet is intended or appropriate, helping customers make informed purchasing decisions.

jewelry_material_categorization.title: Jewelry Material Categorization
jewelry_material_categorization.description: Provide whether the jewelry item is fine, made of at least one precious metal or gemstone, or fashion, made of non-precious materials.

value.title: Jewelry Material Categorization
value.description: Provide whether the jewelry item is fine, made of at least one precious metal or gemstone, or fashion, made of non-precious materials.

material.title: Material
material.description: Provide the material significantly contributing to the look or construction of the item, using "Metal" for all types of metals.

value.title: Material
value.description: Provide the material significantly contributing to the look or construction of the item, using "Metal" for all types of metals.

number_of_items.title: Number of Items
number_of_items.description: Provide the total number of identical items in the selling unit to the customer

value.title: Number of Items
value.description: Provide the total number of identical items in the selling unit to the customer

item_package_quantity.title: Item Package Quantity
item_package_quantity.description: Provide the number of packages sold as part of a single item. An ASIN selling 5 boxes of paperclips with 100 paperclips per box would have item package quantity = '5'

value.title: Item Package Quantity
value.description: Provide the number of packages sold as part of a single item. An ASIN selling 5 boxes of paperclips with 100 paperclips per box would have item package quantity = '5'

water_resistance_level.title: Water Resistance Level
water_resistance_level.description: Provide the degree to which the bracelet can resist water, indicating the jewelry's ability to withstand moisture exposure.

value.title: Water Resistance Level
value.description: Provide the degree to which the bracelet can resist water. Select from standard water resistance classifications for jewelry items.

special_size_type.title: Special Size
special_size_type.description: Specify the special size type for the item

value.title: Special Size
value.description: Specify the special size type for the item

decimal_value.description: Provide the diameter of the item as a decimal

unit.title: Item Diameter Unit
unit.description: Select the unit of measure for Item Diameter. If a value is provided for Item Diameter, you must also enter the corresponding unit.

pendant_description.title: Pendant Description
pendant_description.description: Provide a description of the pendant

value.title: Pendant Description
value.description: Provide a description of the pendant

metal_type.title: Metal Type
metal_type.description: Provide the entire metal composition of the item, including multiple metals if present and base metals for filled or plated items.

value.title: Metal Type
value.description: Provide the entire metal composition of the item, including multiple metals if present and base metals for filled or plated items.

metal_stamp.title: Metal Stamp
metal_stamp.description: Provide the official mark stamped into the surface of the jewelry item indicating the purity or fineness of the metal.

value.title: Metal Stamp
value.description: Provide the official mark stamped into the surface of the jewelry item indicating the purity or fineness of the metal.

metals.title: Metals
metals.description: Provide each unique metal present in the item, including an identification number, the metal type, metal stamp, and weight of each.
examples: id:1, metal_type:White Gold, metal_stamp:14K, metal_weight.value: 5, metal_weight.unit: Grams

id.title: Metal ID
id.description: Provide a unique ID number to identify each unique type of metal present in the item.

metal_type.title: Metal type
metal_type.description: Provide the metal type that is in the item

value.title: Metal Type
value.description: Provide one of the unique metals in the item.

metal_stamp.title: Metal stamp
metal_stamp.description: Provide the appropriate metal stamp representing the metal's fineness

value.title: Metal Stamp
value.description: Provide the official mark stamped into the surface of the item indicating the purity or fineness of the unique type of metal.

metal_weight.title: Metal Weight
metal_weight.description: Provide the weight of the unique type of metal present in the item.

value.title: Metal Weight
value.description: Provide the weight of the unique type of metal present in the item.

unit.title: Metal Weight Unit
unit.description: Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the weight of the unique type of metal present in the item.

gem_type.title: Gem Type
gem_type.description: Provide the type of stone incorporated into the item's design, indicating the specific mineral, stone, or crystalline material.

value.title: Gem Type
value.description: Provide the type of stone incorporated into the item's design, indicating the specific mineral, stone, or crystalline material.

setting_type.title: Setting Type
setting_type.description: Provide the setting design and associated method used to secure stones, gems, pearls, or other decorative items to the jewelry piece.

value.title: Setting Type
value.description: Provide the setting design and associated method used to secure stones, gems, pearls, or other decorative items to the jewelry piece.

stones.title: Stones
stones.description: Provide each unique stone in the item, including an id number, stone type, cut, creation method, treatment, and other relevant information.
examples: Id: 1, type: Ruby, number_of_stones: 3, creation_method: Lab-Created, treatment_method: Bleached, cut: Excellent

id.title: Stone ID

unit_count.title: Unit Count
unit_count.description: Provide the total number of units that make up the item, indicating the quantity of individual pieces or components.

value.title: Unit Count
value.description: For products that are consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension, etc., provide the net quantity that would be shipped to a customer who orders one ASIN (e.g. 12 pack of 6 floz. bottles of water = 72, vs. a single 2 liter bottle = 2). For products consumed as individual units, provide the total number of units (pack of 12 pens = 12). For packed assortments of non-identical items, enter 1

type.title: Unit Count Type
type.description: For items consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension etc., provide the unit of measure listed on the products. For products consumed as individual units, enter: count

batteries_required.title: Are batteries required?
batteries_required.description: Select "yes" if batteries are required to power the item (or if the item is a battery) or no if they are not. Please note that an internal rechargeable battery is also considered a battery

value.title: Are batteries required?
value.description: Select "yes" if batteries are required to power the item (or if the item is a battery) or "no" if they are not. Please note that an internal rechargeable battery is also considered a battery

batteries_included.title: Are batteries included?
batteries_included.description: Select "yes" if batteries are contained in the product (e.g. batteries inside a pair of Bluetooth headphones) and/or included with the product (e.g. batteries packed separately with a camera), otherwise select "no"

value.title: Are batteries included?
value.description: Select "yes" if batteries are contained in the product (e.g. batteries inside a pair of Bluetooth headphones) and/or included with the product (e.g. batteries packed separately with a camera), otherwise select "no"

weight.title: Battery Weight

examples: Batteries Contained in Equipment, Batteries Only, Batteries Packed with Equipment

class.title: GHS Class
class.description: Select the GHS Class of the product from the list of valid values if GHS is selected as the Dangerous Goods Regulation. GHS Class indicates the warning statement assigned by the GHS classification system.
enumNames: Amazon Specific No Label With Warning

hazmat.title: Hazmat
hazmat.description: Provide hazmat information that is relevant to the product based on the aspect selected

aspect.title: Hazmat Aspect
aspect.description: Select the aspect or regulatory body used for the hazardous product information

value.title: Hazmat
value.description: Provide hazmat information that is relevant to the product based on the aspect selected

safety_data_sheet_url.title: Safety Data Sheet (SDS or MSDS) URL
safety_data_sheet_url.description: Provide the SDS/MSDS URL. Required for Hazardous material SDS/MSDS provides information such as physical data (flashpoint, pH, etc.), health concerns, storage, and transportation information for potentially dangerous substances.

value.title: Safety Data Sheet (SDS or MSDS) URL
value.description: Provide the web address for the Safety Data Sheet, containing essential safety information for potentially hazardous materials.

item_weight.title: Item Weight
item_weight.description: Provide the weight of the item (not including the packaging)

value.title: Item Weight
value.description: Provide the item weight numeric value (not including the packaging)

unit.title: Item Weight Unit
unit.description: Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the weight measurement, such as grams or ounces.

value.title: Value
value.description: Numeric value in decimal

unit.title: Item Weight Unit
unit.description: Provide the unit of measurement used to express the weight of the item, such as ounces, grams, or pounds.

is_this_product_subject_to_buyer_age_res.title: Is This Product Subject To Buyer Age Restrictions
is_this_product_subject_to_buyer_age_res.description: Provide whether the product is subject to buyer age restrictions. These can influence the purchase and/or delivery of the product.

value.title: Is This Product Subject To Buyer Age Restrictions
value.description: Provide whether the product is subject to buyer age restrictions. These can influence the purchase and/or delivery of the product.

california_proposition_65.title: California Proposition 65
california_proposition_65.description: Provide the Proposition 65 warning information applicable to your product, if any. By removing or changing the information you certify that the previously provided warning information is no longer legally required

compliance_type.title: California Proposition 65 Warning Type
compliance_type.description: Select the warning type applicable to your product, if any. You certify that the warning provided satisfies legal requirements and that you’ll remove a warning previously provided only if it is no longer legally required.

chemical_names.title: California Proposition 65 Chemical Name(s)
chemical_names.description: If you selected the Food, Furniture, or Chemical warning you must indicate a chemical(s). You certify that the chemical(s) satisfies legal requirements and that you’ll remove a chemical previously provided only if it is no longer legally required.

enumNames: 2,4-Hexadienal (89% trans, trans isomer; 11% cis, trans isomer)
Alcoholic beverages, when associated with alcohol abuse
Aloe Vera, non-decolorized whole leaf extract
Bitumens, extracts of steam-refined and air refined
Carbon black (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)
Ceramic fibers (airborne particles of respirable size)
Chlorinated paraffins (Average chain length, C12;approximately 60 percent chlorine by weight)
Cyanide salts that readily dissociate in solution (expressed as cyanide)f
Emissions from high-temperature unrefined rapeseed oil
Etoposide in combination with cisplatin and bleomycin
Herbal remedies containing plant species of the genus Aristolochia
Hydrogen cyanide (HCN) and cyanide salts (CN salts)
Infant boys, age 29 days to 24 monthsb
Methyl bromide, as a structural fumigant
Neonatal infant boys, age 0 to 28 daysb
Nickel refinery dust from the pyrometallurgical process
Pentachlorophenol and by-products of its synthesis (complex mixture)
Perfluorooctane sulfonic acid (PFOS) and its salts and transformation and degradation precursors
Polychlorinated biphenyls (containing 60 or more percent chlorine by molecular weight)
Quinoline and its strong acid salts
Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.
Silica, crystalline (airborne particles of respirable size)
Soots, tars, and mineral oils (untreated and mildly treated oils and used engine oils)
Strong inorganic acid mists containing sulfuric acid
Titanium dioxide (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)
Tobacco, oral use of smokeless products
Toxins derived from Fusarium moniliforme (Fusarium verticillioides)

cpsia_cautionary_statement.title: CPSIA Cautionary Statement
cpsia_cautionary_statement.description: Provide the safety warning statement for the jewelry item that must appear on product packaging to alert consumers about potential hazards.
examples: No Warning Applicable, Choking Hazard Balloon

value.title: Mandatory Cautionary Statement
value.description: Provide the applicable safety warning statement required by CPSIA regulations for the jewelry item, or indicate if no warning applies.
examples: No Warning Applicable, Choking Hazard - Balloon
enumNames: Choking Hazard - Is a Small Ball

fcc_radio_frequency_emission_compliance.title: FCC Radio Frequency Emission Compliance
fcc_radio_frequency_emission_compliance.description: Provide details on compliance to FCC regulations for products that may emit radio frequencies.

registration_status.title: Radio Frequency Emission & Authorization Status
registration_status.description: Indicate whether this product is capable of emitting radio frequency energy, and if so, what type of FCC RF equipment authorization this product has.
enumNames: Product has a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) with the FCC Rules
Product is an incidental radiator as defined by the FCC. It is not designed to intentionally use, generate or emit RF energy over 9 kHz. It does not require FCC RF equipment authorization
Product not capable of emitting radio frequency energy

identification_number.title: FCC ID
identification_number.description: If the device has an FCC ID, provide it.

point_of_contact_name.title: SDoC Contact Name
point_of_contact_name.description: If the device has a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity, provide the name of the point of contact for the Responsible Party, as defined by the FCC.

point_of_contact_address.title: SDoC Contact US Mailing Address
point_of_contact_address.description: If the device has a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity, provide a US mailing address for the Responsible Party, as defined by the FCC.

point_of_contact_email.title: SDoC Contact Email Address
point_of_contact_email.description: If the device has an SDoC, provide an e-mail address (in this field) or a US phone number (in the next field) for the Responsible Party, as defined by the FCC. If you provide a phone number in the next field, you may enter "N/A" in this field.

point_of_contact_phone_number.title: SDOC Contact US Phone Number
point_of_contact_phone_number.description: If the device has an SDoC, provide a US phone number (in this field) or an e-mail address (in the prior field) for the Responsible Party, as defined by the FCC. If you provide an e-mail address in the prior field, you may enter "N/A" in this field.

regulatory_compliance_certification.title: Regulatory Compliance Certification
regulatory_compliance_certification.description: Provide any regulation that is relevant to the product as well as any required regulatory identications such as certification numbers.

value.title: Regulatory Identification
value.description: Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.

dsa_responsible_party_address.title: Responsible Person's Email or Electronic Address
dsa_responsible_party_address.description: Provide the email address or URL for the EU Responsible Person, representing the product in compliance with EU regulations.

value.title: Responsible Person's Email or Electronic Address
value.description: Provide the email address or URL for the EU Responsible Person, representing the product in compliance with EU regulations.

compliance_media.title: Compliance Media
compliance_media.description: Provide information on the product documents you want to display on the product detail page to comply with the General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR). Alternatively, you can upload images under the PS01-PS06 variants in the Image Manager.

content_type.title: Compliance Media Content Type
content_type.description: Provide the document type. For the GPSR, check the “About product documents” help page to find out which document types are accepted.

content_language.title: Compliance Media Language
content_language.description: Provide the language used for the content of the compliance media.

source_location.title: Compliance Media Source Location
source_location.description: Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser.

gpsr_safety_attestation.title: Safety Attestation
gpsr_safety_attestation.description: Check “yes” if your product doesn’t have any warning and safety information, as it can be used safely and as intended without it.

value.title: Safety Attestation
value.description: Check “yes” if your product doesn’t have any warning and safety information, as it can be used safely and as intended without it.

gpsr_manufacturer_reference.title: GPSR Manufacturer Reference
gpsr_manufacturer_reference.description: Provide the email address or URL of the manufacturer to comply with the EU General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR). If you’ve already submitted this manufacturer’s information in the past, make sure you use the same email or URL.

gpsr_manufacturer_email_address.title: Manufacturer’s Email or Electronic Address
gpsr_manufacturer_email_address.description: Provide the email or URL of the manufacturer. If you’ve submitted this information for the brand before, use the same email or URL.

has_multiple_battery_powered_components.title: Has Multiple Battery Powered Components
has_multiple_battery_powered_components.description: Provide whether the item consits of more than one battery powered components.

value.title: Has Multiple Battery Powered Components
value.description: Provide whether the item consits of more than one battery powered components.

ships_globally.title: Ships Globally
ships_globally.description: Provide whether the item can be shipped globally by Amazon

value.title: Ships Globally
value.description: Provide whether the item can be shipped globally by Amazon

contains_battery_or_cell.title: Contains Battery or Cell
contains_battery_or_cell.description: Provide whether the item uses cells with a single electrochemical unit or batteries with multiple connected cells within a casing.

value.title: Contains Battery or Cell
value.description: Provide whether the item uses cells with a single electrochemical unit or batteries with multiple connected cells within a casing.

battery_contains_free_unabsorbed_liquid.title: Battery Contains free Unabsorbed Liquid
battery_contains_free_unabsorbed_liquid.description: Provides certification that your battery meets transport regulations for free-flowing liquid: no unabsorbed liquid at 55°C & no leakage.

value.title: Battery Contains free Unabsorbed Liquid
value.description: Provides certification that your battery meets transport regulations for free-flowing liquid: no unabsorbed liquid at 55°C & no leakage.

is_battery_non_spillable.title: Is Battery Non Spillable
is_battery_non_spillable.description: Provides certification confirming your battery meets transport regulations for non-spillable status, including vibration and pressure tests

value.title: Is Battery Non Spillable
value.description: Provides certification confirming your battery meets transport regulations for non-spillable status, including vibration and pressure tests

non_lithium_battery_packaging.title: Non-Lithium Battery Packaging
non_lithium_battery_packaging.description: Provide "in equipment" for batteries installed in devices, "with equipment" for those packed separately with the device, and "only" for standalone batteries.

value.title: Non-Lithium Battery Packaging
value.description: Provide "in equipment" for batteries installed in devices, "with equipment" for those packed separately with the device, and "only" for standalone batteries.

has_replaceable_battery.title: Has Replaceable Battery
has_replaceable_battery.description: Provide whether the item's battery is replaceable.

value.title: Has Replaceable Battery
value.description: Provide whether the item's battery is replaceable.

non_lithium_battery_energy_content.title: Non-Lithium Battery Energy Content
non_lithium_battery_energy_content.description: Provide the item's energy content for non-lithium batteries. The attribute refers to the total amount of energy that a battery can store.

value.title: Non-Lithium Battery Energy Content
value.description: Provide the item's energy content for non-lithium batteries. The attribute refers to the total amount of energy that a battery can store.

unit.title: Non-Lithium Battery Energy Content Unit
unit.description: Provide unit of measure used to determine the total amount of energy that a battery can store.

has_less_than_30_percent_state_of_charge.title: Has Less than 30 Percent State of Charge
has_less_than_30_percent_state_of_charge.description: Provide whether the item's battery contains less than 30 percent charge during shipping.

value.title: Has Less than 30 Percent State of Charge
value.description: Provide whether the item's battery contains less than 30 percent charge during shipping.

battery_installation_device_type.title: Battery Installation Device Type
battery_installation_device_type.description: Provide the item's battery installation type. Specifying whether a battery is installed in a vehicle, vessel, or not installed in any device.

value.title: Battery Installation Device Type
value.description: Provide the item's battery installation type. Specifying whether a battery is installed in a vehicle, vessel, or not installed in any device.

is_oem_sourced_product.title: Is OEM Sourced Product
is_oem_sourced_product.description: Provide whether the item is directly sourced from the original equipment manufacturer (OEM).

value.title: Is OEM Sourced Product
value.description: Provide whether the item is directly sourced from the original equipment manufacturer (OEM).

ghs_chemical_h_code.title: GHS Chemical H Code
ghs_chemical_h_code.description: Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.

value.title: GHS Chemical H Code
value.description: Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.

baa_taa_regulation_compliance.title: BAA/TAA Regulation Compliance
baa_taa_regulation_compliance.description: Select BAA compliant (refer FAR 52.225-2); BAA compliant due to exception (refer FAR 25.103); TAA compliant (refer FAR 52.225-6)

value.title: BAA/TAA Regulation Compliance
value.description: Select BAA compliant (refer FAR 52.225-2); BAA compliant due to exception (refer FAR 25.103); TAA compliant (refer FAR 52.225-6)
enumNames: Buy American Act Compliant Due to Exception

baa_taa_compliance_acknowledgement.title: BAA TAA Compliance Acknowledgement
baa_taa_compliance_acknowledgement.description: You acknowledge you are authorized to certify products as BAA/TAA compliant and will immediately update BAA/TAA status change to Amazon.

value.title: BAA TAA Compliance Acknowledgement
value.description: You acknowledge you are authorized to certify products as BAA/TAA compliant and will immediately update BAA/TAA status change to Amazon.

taa_compliant_country.title: TAA Compliant Country
taa_compliant_country.description: Select the TAA country where products are manufactured or substantially transformed.

value.title: TAA Compliant Country
value.description: Select the TAA country where products are manufactured or substantially transformed.
enumNames: South Korea, or Republic of Korea
